test-method.name: shouldDecodeJWTPayload_whenBase64Decoded
test-method.description: POST /login: Should return a JWT payload containing userId, role and exp fields when Base64 decoded

test-method.name: shouldHaveValidJWTStructure_whenLoginSuccessful
test-method.description: POST /login: Should return a JWT token with 3 parts (header.payload.signature) when login is successful

test-method.name: shouldHaveValidTokenExpiry_whenLoginSuccessful
test-method.description: POST /login: Should return a JWT token with expiry (exp) greater than current epoch time when login is successful

test-method.name: shouldLoginSuccessfully_whenValidCredentialsProvided
test-method.description: POST /login: Should return 200 with valid JWT token, correct role and success message when valid credentials are provided

test-method.name: shouldRegisterSuccessfully_whenValidDetailsProvided
test-method.description: POST /register: Should return 201 with userId, email, role in response and create a hashed-password user document in MongoDB when valid details are provided

test-method.name: shouldReturn200_whenForgetPasswordWithInvalidEmail
test-method.description: POST /forget-password: Should return 200 with OTP sent success message even when an unregistered email is provided (no email enumeration)

test-method.name: shouldReturn200_whenForgetPasswordWithValidEmail
test-method.description: POST /forget-password: Should return 200 with OTP sent success message when a valid registered email is provided

test-method.name: shouldReturn200_whenLoginWithValidUser
test-method.description: GET /current-user: Should return 200 with correct email, name and role matching the authenticated user's profile

exception.full-stacktrace: java.lang.AssertionError: expected [pkUser@gmail.com] but found [pkAdmin@gmail.com] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertEqualsImpl(Assert.java:150) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:132) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:656) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:666) at tests.api.AuthApiTests.shouldReturn200_whenLoginWithValidUser(AuthApiTests.java:293) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.DirectMethodHandleAccessor.invoke(DirectMethodHandleAccessor.java:103) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:580) at org.testng.internal.invokers.MethodInvocationHelper.invokeMethod(MethodInvocationHelper.java:139) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeMethod(TestInvoker.java:664) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeTestMethod(TestInvoker.java:227) at org.testng.internal.invokers.MethodRunner.runInSequence(MethodRunner.java:50) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker$MethodInvocationAgent.invoke(TestInvoker.java:957) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeTestMethods(TestInvoker.java:200) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestMethodWorker.invokeTestMethods(TestMethodWorker.java:148) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestMethodWorker.run(TestMethodWorker.java:128) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor.runWorker(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:1144) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor$Worker.run(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:642) at java.base/java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:1583)

test-method.name: shouldReturn200_whenLoginWithValidUser
test-method.description: GET /current-user: Should return 200 with correct email, name and role matching the authenticated user's profile

exception.full-stacktrace: java.lang.AssertionError: expected [pkUser@gmail.com] but found [pkAdmin@gmail.com] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertEqualsImpl(Assert.java:150) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:132) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:656) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:666) at tests.api.AuthApiTests.shouldReturn200_whenLoginWithValidUser(AuthApiTests.java:293) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.DirectMethodHandleAccessor.invoke(DirectMethodHandleAccessor.java:103) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:580) at org.testng.internal.invokers.MethodInvocationHelper.invokeMethod(MethodInvocationHelper.java:139) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeMethod(TestInvoker.java:664) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.retryFailed(TestInvoker.java:248) at org.testng.internal.invokers.MethodRunner.runInSequence(MethodRunner.java:62) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker$MethodInvocationAgent.invoke(TestInvoker.java:957) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeTestMethods(TestInvoker.java:200) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestMethodWorker.invokeTestMethods(TestMethodWorker.java:148) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestMethodWorker.run(TestMethodWorker.java:128) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor.runWorker(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:1144) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor$Worker.run(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:642) at java.base/java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:1583)

test-method.name: shouldBookShow_whenValidPaymentAndShowDetailsAreProvided
test-method.description: POST /book-show: Should return 200, pass schema validation and return correct booking details

test-method.name: shouldReturnBookingInList_whenFetchingAllBookings
test-method.description: GET /get-all-bookings: Should return 200, pass schema validation and include the newly created booking with correct fields

exception.message:
1 expectation failed. Response body doesn't match expectation. Expected: The content to match the given JSON schema. error: instance type (null) does not match any allowed primitive type (allowed: ["object"]) level: "error" schema: {"loadingURI":"file:/C:/SDET/Selenium_Java_Automation/Selenium_with_Maven/BMSProject/target/test-classes/schema/get-bookings-schema.json#","pointer":"/properties/data/items/properties/show"} instance: {"pointer":"/data/0/show"} domain: "validation" keyword: "type" found: "null" expected: ["object"]
Actual: {"success":true,"message":"Bookings fetched!","data":[{"_id":"69e9ec6f2629f45c5f2d886b","show":null,"user":{"_id":"67f9d3dfdf5e2138692da3b2","name":"AdminPramod","email":"pkAdmin@gmail.com","password":"$2b$12$daHrtjX6sT/ChURr0cODKukYFDwfjmTe49uCrMCek4QovJ781bp12","role":"Admin","__v":0},"seats":[10],"transactionId":"pi_3TPJyE4FA6mIWZeo14s02MLD","createdAt":"2026-04-23T09:54:55.384Z","updatedAt":"2026-04-23T09:54:55.384Z","__v":0}]}

test-method.name: shouldReturnBookingInList_whenFetchingAllBookings
test-method.description: GET /get-all-bookings: Should return 200, pass schema validation and include the newly created booking with correct fields

exception.message:
1 expectation failed. Response body doesn't match expectation. Expected: The content to match the given JSON schema. error: instance type (null) does not match any allowed primitive type (allowed: ["object"]) level: "error" schema: {"loadingURI":"file:/C:/SDET/Selenium_Java_Automation/Selenium_with_Maven/BMSProject/target/test-classes/schema/get-bookings-schema.json#","pointer":"/properties/data/items/properties/show"} instance: {"pointer":"/data/0/show"} domain: "validation" keyword: "type" found: "null" expected: ["object"]
Actual: {"success":true,"message":"Bookings fetched!","data":[{"_id":"69e9ec6f2629f45c5f2d886b","show":null,"user":{"_id":"67f9d3dfdf5e2138692da3b2","name":"AdminPramod","email":"pkAdmin@gmail.com","password":"$2b$12$daHrtjX6sT/ChURr0cODKukYFDwfjmTe49uCrMCek4QovJ781bp12","role":"Admin","__v":0},"seats":[10],"transactionId":"pi_3TPJyE4FA6mIWZeo14s02MLD","createdAt":"2026-04-23T09:54:55.384Z","updatedAt":"2026-04-23T09:54:55.384Z","__v":0},{"_id":"69e9ec752629f45c5f2d8889","show":{"_id":"69e9ec712629f45c5f2d8879","name":"Fight Club Show 2511","date":"2026-04-23T00:00:00.000Z","time":"10:00","movie":{"_id":"68ba514310affd6a92ed0d82","movieName":"Fight Club","description":"Unhappy with his capitalistic lifestyle, a white-collared insomniac forms an underground fight club with Tyler, a careless soap salesman. Soon, their venture spirals down into something sinister.\n","duration":139,"genre":"Action","language":"English","releaseDate":"2025-09-06T00:00:00.000Z","poster":"data:image/jpeg;base64,","__v":0},"ticketPrice":1500,"totalSeats":100,"bookedSeats":[10],"theatre":"6888d3139e7f9c58df68dc69","createdAt":"2026-04-23T09:54:57.905Z","updatedAt":"2026-04-23T09:55:02.227Z","__v":0},"user":{"_id":"67f9d3dfdf5e2138692da3b2","name":"AdminPramod","email":"pkAdmin@gmail.com","password":"$2b$12$daHrtjX6sT/ChURr0cODKukYFDwfjmTe49uCrMCek4QovJ781bp12","role":"Admin","__v":0},"seats":[10],"transactionId":"pi_3TPJyK4FA6mIWZeo0Q4H9cMp","createdAt":"2026-04-23T09:55:01.312Z","updatedAt":"2026-04-23T09:55:01.312Z","__v":0}]}

test-method.name: shouldPersistTheatreInDB_whenValidPartnerAddsNewTheatre
test-method.description: POST /add-theatre: Should return 200 with success message and persist theatre data in MongoDB when valid partner adds a new theatre

test-method.name: shouldReflectUpdatedFieldsInResponseAndDB_whenExistingTheatreIsModified
test-method.description: PUT /update-theatre: Should return 200 and reflect updated address in response and MongoDB when an existing theatre is modified by its owner

test-method.name: shouldRemoveTheatreFromDB_whenValidTheatreIdIsDeleted
test-method.description: DELETE /delete-theatre: Should return 200 and remove the theatre document from MongoDB when a valid theatre ID is provided

test-method.name: shouldReturnTheatreInGlobalList_whenFetchingAllTheatres
test-method.description: GET /theatres: Should return 200 and include the newly added theatre in the global list, with fields matching MongoDB document

test-method.name: shouldReturnTheatreInOwnerList_whenFilteredByOwnerId
test-method.description: GET /theatres/owner/{ownerId}: Should return 200 and include the newly added theatre in the response list, with fields matching MongoDB document

test-method.name: shouldPersistShowInDB_whenValidShowIsAdded
test-method.description: POST /add-show: Should return 200 with success message and persist show data in MongoDB when valid show details are provided

test-method.name: shouldReflectUpdatedFieldsInResponseAndDB_whenExistingShowIsModified
test-method.description: PUT /update-show: Should return 200 and reflect updated fields in response and MongoDB when an existing show is modified

test-method.name: shouldReflectUpdatedFieldsInResponseAndDB_whenExistingShowIsModified
test-method.description: PUT /update-show: Should return 200 and reflect updated fields in response and MongoDB when an existing show is modified

exception.full-stacktrace: java.lang.IllegalStateException: state should be: open at com.mongodb.assertions.Assertions.isTrue(Assertions.java:109) at com.mongodb.internal.connection.BaseCluster.selectServer(BaseCluster.java:103) at com.mongodb.internal.connection.AbstractMultiServerCluster.selectServer(AbstractMultiServerCluster.java:54) at com.mongodb.internal.binding.ClusterBinding.getReadConnectionSource(ClusterBinding.java:116) at com.mongodb.client.internal.ClientSessionBinding.getConnectionSource(ClientSessionBinding.java:128) at com.mongodb.client.internal.ClientSessionBinding.getReadConnectionSource(ClientSessionBinding.java:92) at com.mongodb.internal.operation.SyncOperationHelper.withSuppliedResource(SyncOperationHelper.java:144) at com.mongodb.internal.operation.SyncOperationHelper.withSourceAndConnection(SyncOperationHelper.java:125) at com.mongodb.internal.operation.FindOperation.lambda$execute$2(FindOperation.java:322) at com.mongodb.internal.operation.SyncOperationHelper.lambda$decorateReadWithRetries$12(SyncOperationHelper.java:292) at com.mongodb.internal.async.function.RetryingSyncSupplier.get(RetryingSyncSupplier.java:67) at com.mongodb.internal.operation.FindOperation.execute(FindOperation.java:333) at com.mongodb.internal.operation.FindOperation.execute(FindOperation.java:73) at com.mongodb.client.internal.MongoClientDelegate$DelegateOperationExecutor.execute(MongoClientDelegate.java:153) at com.mongodb.client.internal.FindIterableImpl.first(FindIterableImpl.java:213) at data.MongoHelper.findOne(MongoHelper.java:48) at tests.api.ShowApiTests.shouldReflectUpdatedFieldsInResponseAndDB_whenExistingShowIsModified(ShowApiTests.java:125) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.DirectMethodHandleAccessor.invoke(DirectMethodHandleAccessor.java:103) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:580) at org.testng.internal.invokers.MethodInvocationHelper.invokeMethod(MethodInvocationHelper.java:139) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeMethod(TestInvoker.java:664) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.retryFailed(TestInvoker.java:248) at org.testng.internal.invokers.MethodRunner.runInSequence(MethodRunner.java:62) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker$MethodInvocationAgent.invoke(TestInvoker.java:957) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeTestMethods(TestInvoker.java:200) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestMethodWorker.invokeTestMethods(TestMethodWorker.java:148) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestMethodWorker.run(TestMethodWorker.java:128) at java.base/java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:1583)

test-method.name: shouldPersistMovieInDB_whenValidAdminAddsNewMovie
test-method.description: POST /add-movie: Should return 200 with success message and persist movie data in MongoDB when valid partner adds a new movie

test-method.name: shouldReflectUpdatedFieldsInResponseAndDB_whenExistingMovieIsModified
test-method.description: PUT /update-movie: Should return 200 and reflect updated fields in response and MongoDB when an existing movie is modified

test-method.name: shouldRemoveTheatreFromDB_whenValidMovieIdIsDeleted
test-method.description: DELETE /delete-movie: Should return 200 and remove the movie document from MongoDB when a valid movie ID is provided

test-method.name: shouldReturnMovieInGlobalList_whenFetchingAllMovies
test-method.description: GET /movies: Should return 200 and include the newly added movie in the global list, with fields matching MongoDB document

test-method.name: shouldReturnMovieInMoviesList_whenFilteredByMovieId
test-method.description: GET /{movieId}: Should return 200 and include the newly added movie in the response list, with fields matching MongoDB document

param.value: By.xpath: //input[@placeholder='Type here to search for movies']

exception.message:
element click intercepted: Element is not clickable at point (1307, 430). Other element would receive the click:
...
(Session info: chrome=147.0.7727.102) Build info: version: '4.21.0', revision: '79ed462ef4' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.9' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [92bfbcc3f7369b7f81fe8d1252dc86d3, clickElement {id=f.7071900F654C339A449E4F4A53C9274C.d.334B42155557EFD67F26BAA5505F8D59.e.30}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 147.0.7727.102, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 147.0.7727.117 (474cc805edd..., userDataDir: C:\Users\pramo\AppData\Loca...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:54901}, goog:processID: 6292, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:54901/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 147.0.7727.102, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Element: [[ChromeDriver: chrome on windows (92bfbcc3f7369b7f81fe8d1252dc86d3)] -> xpath: //td[normalize-space(text())='PVR']/ancestor::tr//*[normalize-space(text())='+ Shows']/ancestor::button] Session ID: 92bfbcc3f7369b7f81fe8d1252dc86d3

exception.message:
element click intercepted: Element is not clickable at point (1307, 430). Other element would receive the click:
...
